newsSince: Astronics announced a 20% Class B stock distribution (June 1, record June 15) and received a ~$44.7M U.S. Army purchase order for TS-4549/T radio test sets (full-rate production). Q1 (reported earlier) showed record bookings of $290.4M and $734.3M backlog. News is defense/aerospace-driven.

sources.label: Yahoo: Astronics Class B distribution/shelf filings
Astronics up on new Army radio test order (Simply Wall St)

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent-AI lens: the speculative pathway is aerospace power/test adapting to rugged edge compute. New items (Class B distribution, $44.7M Army test order) are capital-structure/defense events, not evidence for the rugged-edge-compute adaptation. Hold; +84% YTD is defense-driven, not new AI alpha.
verdicts.bull: Strong aerospace backlog ($734M) and test-systems franchise; record bookings.
verdicts.neutral: Defense/aerospace tailwind real but off the strict AI-adjacency pathway.
verdicts.bear: Rugged-edge-compute thesis remains speculative; +84% YTD on aerospace, not AI.
